per_turn_leaks.student_message: Do you have any sweating, nausea, or dizziness with it?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yes, I do get some sweating during these episodes. It's a lot of sweating, mostly on my upper body like my underarms and forehead. And yes, I also feel a little nauseous, but it's more of a mild feeling, not bad enough to make me want to vomit.
